    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`origin`}</inlineCode>{` property is automatically set by the SDK and is included in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LiveActivityData`}</inlineCode>{` struct. You typically don't need to set this value manually.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-swift"
